_comment: kit settings template (v3.3). permissions.allow ships ACTIVE with read-only commands so review/research subagents don't spam permission prompts — trim or extend to taste. Hooks stay commented-out by default: rename '_hooksDisabledByDefault_uncomment_to_enable' to 'hooks' and restart the session to enable. Enable SessionStart and Stop TOGETHER — the Stop gate reads the baseline that SessionStart records; without it, committed changes are invisible to the gate.
